The '''Brogune''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Approaching Storm" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> a [[Unidentified Brogune concubine|Brogune]] served as a concubine for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin]], who was a [[Bossban]]—a criminal leader—based on the<ref name="Approaching Storm" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Ansion system/Legends|Ansion system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. The Brogune was one of his many concubines, which included [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and members of other species.<ref name="Approaching Storm" /> Brogune were among the species whose females the Hutt found attractive.<ref name="FF140">{{FactFile|140|HUT 15-18|The Hutts}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Brogune appeared in ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', a [[2002]] novel written by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="Approaching Storm" />
